comment.body:
At my bank they wrote me this 😂 

Cause i had some long position on oil 

Subject: Oil Market Situation – Strategic Update

Good morning,

After averaging the price, the situation turned in our favor thanks to the escalation of the Israel-Iran conflict. However, the question remains: how long can this last? Just yesterday afternoon, on rumors that the Iranian government might request a safe passage to Russia, oil lost about 3%, later recovering without surpassing Friday’s highs.

It’s important to note that Trump is actively working on several fronts to bring this situation to an end. He’s deploying some of his most influential allies, as he wants oil prices to remain low to avoid further inflation—pressuring Powell to reduce interest rates and ease the federal deficit.

Moreover, how long can Iran continue launching missiles toward Israel, considering they’ve already supplied drones to Putin?

Given all this, I’d prefer to stay on the sidelines for now, ready to shift our positions to the short side—locking in the recovery achieved so far and potentially riding a downward move in oil prices with the goal of fully recovering our capital.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

Thank you,
